svg.title: BFF Platform Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing Program.cs as composition root connecting to Setup, Middleware, Controllers, Services, Endpoints, and external Entra identity provider.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in Program.cs composition root for a BFF?')
sendPrompt('Explain BFF PlatformAuthenticationSetup: cookie + OIDC schemes')
sendPrompt('What does PlatformCorsSetup configure in a BFF?')
sendPrompt('Why does a BFF need antiforgery setup and how does it relate to the Angular XSRF cookie?')
sendPrompt('How should token-bucket rate limiting be scoped per TenantId in a BFF?')
sendPrompt('What health checks should a BFF expose?')
sendPrompt('What security headers should SecurityHeadersMiddleware set in a BFF?')
sendPrompt('How should CorrelationIdMiddleware attach correlation IDs to OpenTelemetry spans in a BFF?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the AuthController login, session, and logout flow in a BFF with OIDC')
sendPrompt('How should ProxyController forward requests to downstream APIs, including token forwarding?')
sendPrompt('How does AntiForgeryController seed the XSRF cookie for Angular?')
sendPrompt('How does TokenRefreshService handle refresh_token rotation securely server-side in the BFF?')
sendPrompt('How should GraphUserProfileService cache the /me endpoint and profile photo?')
sendPrompt('What should BFF health check probes verify?')
sendPrompt('What should /health/live and /health/ready check in a BFF?')
sendPrompt('How should SPA fallback be implemented in a .NET BFF to serve index.html for all unmatched routes?')
sendPrompt('How should SessionMetrics use OpenTelemetry Meter to track session counts in the BFF?')
sendPrompt('What does Entra v2 token endpoint return during token refresh in a BFF OIDC flow?')
